name: lesty

metadata.name: lesty
metadata.summary: A simple CLI tool to test lambdas using an event.json file

documentation:
# Lesty

A CLI tool to execute AWS Lambda handlers with a JSON event file.

## Installation

Install as a development dependency in your Python project:


```sh
poetry add --group=dev lesty
```

or 

```sh
uv add --dev lesty
```

## Usage
```sh
uv run lesty /path/to/lambda_handler.py /path/to/event.json
```

functions.name: lesty.cli.execute_lambda
documentation:
Executes a Lambda handler with the given event JSON file.

Args:
handler_path: Path to the Python file containing the lambda_handler function.
event_path: Path to the JSON file containing the event data.
